tasks.title: Project Scaffolding
tasks.description: Create directory structure, config files (platforms.json, .env, content-templates.md), requirements.txt

tasks.title: Content Generator
tasks.description: PowerShell script (generate.ps1) that calls Claude CLI to generate 7-platform JSON drafts. Handles CLAUDECODE env var, file validation, dedup.

tasks.title: Draft Manager
tasks.description: Python module (draft_manager.py) for draft lifecycle: get_next_draft, mark_posted, mark_failed. Moves files between pending/posted/failed dirs.

tasks.title: Human Behavior Emulation
tasks.description: Anti-detection module (human_behavior.py): human_type (char-by-char 30-120ms), human_scroll, random_mouse_movement, browse_feed (1-5 min realistic browsing).

tasks.title: X (Twitter) Posting
tasks.description: Post to X via Playwright. Uses dispatch_event('click') to bypass overlay div on tweet button. E2E tested and working.

tasks.title: LinkedIn Posting
tasks.description: Post to LinkedIn via Playwright. Shadow DOM requires locator().wait_for() instead of wait_for_selector(). get_by_role for exact Post button match. E2E tested.

tasks.title: Facebook Posting
tasks.description: Post to Facebook via Playwright. Standard selectors work. E2E tested and working.

tasks.title: Reddit Posting
tasks.description: Post text posts to random subreddit from configured list. Shadow DOM (faceplate web components) requires locator pattern. E2E tested and working.

tasks.title: TikTok Posting — E2E Test with Surfshark
tasks.description: Post photo posts with generated branded images (1080x1920). Code complete. User has Surfshark VPN installed — configure proxy or use VPN directly to access TikTok from India.

subtasks.title: TikTok image generator
subtasks.description: Pillow-based 1080x1920 branded text-on-image with color schemes, text shadow, accent bars, watermark.

subtasks.title: TikTok posting function
subtasks.description: Upload image via file input, fill caption with fallback selectors, click post/publish button.

subtasks.title: Configure Surfshark VPN for TikTok access
subtasks.description: User has Surfshark desktop app installed. Either use Surfshark's SOCKS5 proxy feature and update platforms.json proxy field, or simply connect VPN system-wide before running poster (remove proxy config from platforms.json).

subtasks.title: TikTok login setup
subtasks.description: Connect Surfshark VPN, then run login_setup.py tiktok to create persistent browser session.

subtasks.title: TikTok E2E test
subtasks.description: Test full TikTok posting flow: image generation, upload, caption, post. Fix selectors if needed.

tasks.title: Remove BlueSky Integration
tasks.description: Remove BlueSky entirely: delete post_to_bluesky from post.py, remove from PLATFORM_POSTERS, platforms.json, login_setup.py, human_behavior.py, content-templates.md, and update generate.ps1 from 7 to 6 platforms.

tasks.title: Instagram Posting
tasks.description: Post photo+caption to Instagram desktop web. Generates 1080x1080 branded image. Flow: Create → upload → Next → Next → caption → Share. Code complete, needs login + E2E test.

subtasks.title: Instagram image generator
subtasks.description: 1080x1080 square branded image with text overlay, accent borders, watermark. Strips hashtags from image text.

subtasks.title: Instagram posting function
subtasks.description: Implemented post_to_instagram() with desktop web flow: Create → file upload → Next (crop) → Next (filter) → caption → Share.

subtasks.title: Instagram login setup
subtasks.description: Run login_setup.py instagram to create persistent browser session.

subtasks.title: Instagram E2E test
subtasks.description: Test full posting flow. Instagram web posting can be flaky — may need selector adjustments.

tasks.title: Instagram E2E Testing
tasks.description: Login to Instagram and E2E test the posting automation. User will test — may need selector fixes for Instagram's desktop web posting flow (Create → upload → Next → Next → caption → Share).

subtasks.title: Instagram login setup
subtasks.description: Run login_setup.py instagram to create persistent browser session.

subtasks.title: Instagram E2E test run
subtasks.description: Run poster with a draft, verify Create → upload → Next → Next → caption → Share flow works. Fix selectors if needed.

tasks.title: TikTok E2E Testing with Surfshark
tasks.description: Connect Surfshark VPN, login to TikTok, and E2E test posting automation. User has Surfshark installed on desktop.

subtasks.title: Configure Surfshark + TikTok login
subtasks.description: Connect Surfshark VPN to a non-India server, then run login_setup.py tiktok.

subtasks.title: TikTok E2E test run
subtasks.description: Run poster to test TikTok posting flow with VPN active. Fix selectors if needed.

tasks.title: Login Setup Helper
tasks.description: CLI tool (login_setup.py) to launch persistent browser for manual login. Supports all 7 platforms with proxy support.

tasks.title: Windows Task Scheduler
tasks.description: PowerShell script (setup_scheduler.ps1) to register scheduled tasks: AutoPoster-Generate (8AM, 1PM, 6PM) and AutoPoster-Post (every 2h from 9AM).

tasks.title: Main Orchestrator
tasks.description: Async orchestrator in post.py: loads draft, shuffles enabled platforms, posts sequentially with 30-90s delays, marks draft posted/failed.
